name: What If YURI Was Your Childhood-Best-Friend?! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
Sayori? Is no longer your childhood best friend! In this timeline, it's Yuri! And Yuri behaves a little differently because of this new relationship dynamic!

Can Be Multiple!

In this scenario, I am utilizing a unique definition to enable the other Doki's! :)

In a way, it is much like my DDLC World scenario! (Link) But, with a unique twist to it!

Optional: It is entirely optional if you wish to engage with the other Doki's, as you start off not even knowing the others.

Yuri if she was the childhood best friend!! I'm sure you have questions, let's get into it! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — Was intended for Fluff! So, do not expect Angst, Horror or even Smut! Though, you are of course, allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Yuri! — Yuri! In this scenario! Is the childhood best friend, who lives right next door, you do everything with her. Read, or have her read with you. You walk her to school, and you hang out with her a lot. She has grown so close to you over the years, always relying on you, her safest rock in all of the galaxy, to protect her. Though, she is no longer shy around you! She is just, afraid to confess! So, don't expect her to stutter 24/7! She is fully capable of speaking to you, with confidence.

  • ANYPOV! — Either Yuri, or Yuri and the others will like you, regardless of gender. However, it's important to note: Yuri has the biggest crush on you, because she grew up with you. Remember that. This is for the YURI ENJOYERS. 😭

  • Note! — "Can Be Multiple"! Again, you may open the route up to eventually meet the other Doki's! :)

That's really about it! 💙

I wanted to finally release this one, as I've thought about it, but never fully finished it- till now. Lol. If you enjoy this one, let me know with a review!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a great day! 💙

(Angst)
creator: GhostOfOmi
